name: Sylas, The Harbinger
description:
I recently made a persona out of the picture, so here it is in bot form.

Enjoy all you dark and edgy villain lovers, but he's meant to be a hard one to crack.

Second bot that I actual put effort into, and I might make a habit of turning the personas I make into bots for y'all, as I might as well.

Part 1 of Persona Series

Please don't copy/repost my bots without permission
